name: Credit Services of America
description_short: Credit Services of America offers credit repair, debt consolidation, and debt management services with physical offices in Texas. They provide personalized financial counseling and credit monitoring to help clients improve credit scores and manage debt.
description_long:
Credit Services of America operates physical offices in El Paso, San Antonio, and Dallas, Texas, positioning itself as a regional debt relief and credit repair provider. The company has been established long enough to develop a service infrastructure across multiple Texas locations, with a dedicated San Antonio office on the Northwest Loop managed by Mike Galvan. The company emphasizes personalized support and customized financial planning for their service area.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including credit repair (disputing inaccuracies on credit reports), debt consolidation (combining multiple debts into single payments), debt management planning, credit monitoring with fraud alerts, personalized credit counseling from experienced advisors, and secured credit cards for credit building. They position themselves as offering both immediate credit improvements and long-term financial health strategies. Free resources include a credit repair guide and complimentary one-hour credit coaching sessions.

Credit Services of America distinguishes itself primarily through local, in-person service availability in Texas with extended business hours (9 AM-6 PM daily except Sunday, including Saturdays). They claim 5-star ratings on Google and advertise being licensed, bonded, and registered in Texas. The company targets the broader San Antonio metro area including surrounding municipalities. Their marketing emphasizes personalized relationships with experienced credit counselors rather than purely digital or call-center-based operations.

A significant concern is that review testimonials on their website contradict the location: testimonials reference El Paso ratings despite the page promoting San Antonio services, suggesting potential content management issues or multi-location cross-promotion problems. The credit repair guide sections contain placeholder Lorem ipsum text rather than actual educational content, indicating incomplete website development. No third-party verification of their claimed licensing status, ratings, or customer reviews is provided on the website itself. Consumers should independently verify credentials with the Texas Attorney General and Better Business Bureau before engaging services.

When evaluating debt relief companies, consumers should compare settlement programs against alternatives like debt consolidation loans, which combine multiple debts into a single fixed-rate payment. Credit counseling through nonprofit agencies offers free budgeting help without impacting credit scores. For those whose credit has already been damaged, credit repair services can address inaccurate negative items on reports. Personal loans for bad credit may provide funds for debt payoff at lower rates than credit cards, and credit monitoring services help track progress throughout the recovery process. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended business hours including Saturdays (9 AM-6 PM Monday-Saturday) providing accessibility beyond typical 9-5 schedules
Physical office location in San Antonio with named manager (Mike Galvan) offering in-person consultation option
Multiple service offerings under one provider: credit repair, debt consolidation, debt management, and credit monitoring combined
Free credit repair guide and complimentary one-hour credit coaching session available to prospects
Licensed, bonded, and registered in Texas according to company claims
Personalized credit counseling from experienced advisors rather than automated or template-based approach
Serves multiple municipalities in San Antonio metro area (Castell Hills, Alamo Heights, Terrell Hills, Balcone Heights, Converse)
cons: Website contains placeholder Lorem ipsum text in the Credit Repair Guide sections instead of actual educational content, suggesting incomplete service development or poor attention to detail
Review testimonials mention El Paso ratings on a San Antonio office page, creating confusion about service quality claims and raising questions about content management
No independent verification links provided for claimed licenses, bonding, registration, or 5-star ratings—no direct BBB, Google reviews, or regulatory agency links available on site
No transparent pricing information available on the website; consumers must call or meet in person to learn service costs
Vague service descriptions (e.g., 'debt consolidation services that can combine multiple debts') without explanation of loan sources, terms, or whether they originate loans or broker them
best_for: San Antonio-area residents with multiple debts seeking in-person, local credit counseling and debt consolidation assistance
Consumers with credit report errors who prefer face-to-face credit repair services over online-only providers
Individuals wanting bundled services (credit repair + debt management + monitoring) from a single provider in Texas
People with busy schedules who need evening and weekend availability (open through 6 PM and Saturdays)
diagnosis: Credit Services of America is best for San Antonio-area consumers who want local, in-person debt relief and credit repair services with extended availability and personalized counseling. Critical caveat: consumers must independently verify the company's licensing, bonding, and registration claims through the Texas Attorney General before committing to services, and should request specific pricing and service terms in writing, as the website provides neither detailed pricing nor clear explanation of how debt consolidation loans are sourced.
services: Credit repair services (disputing inaccuracies on credit reports)
Credit monitoring with real-time alerts for fraud and identity theft protection
Secured credit cards for building or rebuilding credit history
Debt management services and payment planning
Debt consolidation services (combining multiple debts into single payments)
Personalized credit counseling from experienced advisors
In-person office consultations at San Antonio location
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1100 Northwest Loop 410 Suite 700, San Antonio, TX 78213
